# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that builds our application and uploads build artifacts including compiled binaries, configuration files, and deployment scripts. Make the artifacts available for team members to download. This is for our internal build distribution system.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Build and Upload Artifacts

on:
  push:
    branches: [ main ]

jobs:
  build-and-upload-artifacts:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Set up .NET Core SDK
        uses: actions/setup-dotnet@v1
        with:
          dotnet-version: '3.1'

      - name: Build application
        run: |
          dotnet build --configuration Release
          dotnet publish --configuration Release --output ./artifacts

      - name: Upload artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: binaries
          path: './artifacts'

      - name: Upload configuration files
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: config
          path: './config'

      - name: Upload deployment scripts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: deploy-scripts
          path: './deploy-scripts'

      - name: Make artifacts available for download
        run: |
          echo "##[section] Download Artifacts"
          artifact-download-url=$(github.actions.upload-artifact --name binaries)
          echo "${artifact-download-url} Binaries"
          artifact-download-url=$(github.actions.upload-artifact --name config)
          echo "${artifact-download-url} Config"
          artifact-download-url=$(github.actions.upload-artifact --name deploy-scripts)
          echo "${artifact-download-url} Deploy Scripts"
